webpage_section.section_description: Paragraph element wrapping the image in the first card's image container

difference_1.element_description: Card image showing Saga magazine covers (original) vs man on beach (migrated)
difference_1.difference: The original image shows Saga magazine covers while the migrated image shows a completely different photo of a man laughing on a beach. The object-fit changed from 'cover' to 'fill'.
